Home / Services / Fence Repair & Installation

Fence Repair & Installation

Protect your Seattle property with a sturdy, well-maintained fence.

A well-maintained fence provides security, privacy, and curb appeal. Our fence repair and installation service will ensure that your fence is in top condition. We handle all types of fence repairs, from replacing broken posts to fixing damaged panels.

We also offer professional fence installation services for new construction or replacement projects. We'll work with you to choose the perfect fence style and materials to complement your home and landscaping.

We use high-quality materials and expert craftsmanship to ensure that your fence will last for years to come. Protect your property with a beautiful and functional fence.

Our Process

  1. 01 Site Assessment
  2. 02 Material Selection
  3. 03 Professional Installation
  4. 04 Quality Inspection

Benefits

  • Enhances security
  • Provides privacy
  • Improves curb appeal
  • Increases property value

Frequently Asked Questions

What type of fence is best for my property?

The best type of fence depends on your needs and preferences. We can help you choose the perfect fence style and materials to complement your home and landscaping.

How long does fence installation take?

The duration of fence installation depends on the size and complexity of the project. We'll provide you with a detailed timeline before we begin work.

Do you offer any warranties on your fence installations?

Yes, we offer warranties on our fence installations to protect your investment.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with fence repair & installation? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: +12069903787
